text.title: Postmortem Action Item SLO Tracking Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping incident-frequency + ownership signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: publish SLO policy first; then stand up ledger
commit ledger skeleton + backfill recent incidents

example.trace: incidents=12 → owner_present=true → slo_present=true → append-only → commit skeleton + backfill last 90d

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
